results.title: Veteran late-night radio host Graeme Gilbert dies aged 76 following an ongoing battle with cancer
results.description: Retired radio star Graeme Gilbert died aged 76 on Friday following an ongoing battle with acute leukaemia.

results.title: Mistborn at 20: How Brandon Sanderson's Epic Blends Fantasy with Hard Science
results.description: A reflection on the twentieth anniversary of Mistborn reveals how Brandon Sanderson's iconic series transcends traditional epic fantasy to embrace science fiction and rigorous scientific principles.
